description_long: This is a black athletic running shoe with a mesh upper and synthetic overlays, featuring a prominent lime green Asics logo on both sides. The shoe has a lace-up closure with black laces and a padded tongue that displays the Asics brand label in blue and white. The midsole is thick and appears to be made of cushioned foam, while the outsole is a bright yellow-green with a segmented tread pattern for traction. The heel and toe areas are reinforced for durability, and the interior is lined with a soft, likely fabric material for comfort. The shoe's design is sporty and functional, suitable for running or casual urban wear. Subtle blue accents are visible on the upper, adding to the dynamic appearance.
description: A black and lime green Asics running shoe with mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and a bright yellow-green treaded sole. Features include a lace-up closure, padded tongue, and sporty design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the black mesh upper, lime green Asics logo, padded tongue with blue Asics label, and black laces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large lime green Asics logo, mesh texture, and the thick, cushioned midsole.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the segmented, bright yellow-green tread pattern of the sole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Asics logo, mesh upper, and visible midsole and outsole contours.
attribute_logo: Blue and white Asics label on the tongue; large lime green Asics logo on both sides.
